channel.title: howto, on कम्पुटर पाठशाला
channel.description: Recent content in howto, on कम्पुटर पाठशाला

item.title: Beamer (presentation)
item.description: लाटेक बीमर \documentclass{beamer} \usetheme{Berkeley} \begin{document} \begin{frame} \tableofcontents \end{frame} \section{First} \begin{frame}{First section slide} ... \end{frame} \section{Second} %Contents with current section highlighted \frame{\tableofcontents[currentsection]} \begin{frame}{Second section slide} ... \end{frame} \end{document} yes
